title: BUG #17633: Define rule on views which do insert to another relation trigger cache lookup failed error.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(i INTEGER, j INTEGER, k TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2(a INTEGER, b REAL, c INTEGER, d INTEGER DEFAULT 0);
INSERT INTO t1(i, j) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, NULL);
key_bug_features: create rule on view query t1 will trigger this issue
